name: AWS Bedrock Unauthorized Model Invocation Logs Deletion Attempt
description: This model detects unauthorized deletion attempts of an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base, potentially indicating malicious activity or a misconfigured access policy. The impact of such events includes the potential loss of valuable information stored within the knowledge base, which can disrupt the AI model service and compromise data integrity.

rules.name: AWS Bedrock Unauthorized Model Invocation Logs Deletion Attempt

author: Yash Verma
